creator: rakuco@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Don Lewis from comment #85)
I don't have any objections to that -- it just wasn't clear to me at the time if you would drive the exp-run, or if I should ask for it, or whether you'd prefer to just land everything at once (plus comment #53 mentioned everything would be at least tested all at once).

I'm definitely in favor of smaller patches, so let me know if you need help with the qt4-moc exp-run.
